conflict: Director Kwon offers financial relief and historical mission in exchange for illegal secrecy and narrative labor.
consequence: Ina signs a probationary contract, becoming legally and morally entangled.
must_land_beats: Ina enters the print-shop safehouse and meets Kwon.
Kwon frames culture as the only viable reunification instrument.
The contract ties salary relief to non-disclosure and operational obedience.
Ina accepts the role while promising herself she can stay ethically clean.
objective: Verify the legitimacy of the secret government-in-exile and define Ina's role.
